finding.raw.title: Apache Tomcat AJP File Read / Inclusion
finding.raw.description: A vulnerability in Apache Tomcat allows a remote attacker to read arbitrary files or include and execute arbitrary code on the server.

finding.processed.title: Apache Tomcat AJP File Read / Inclusion
finding.processed.description: A vulnerability in Apache Tomcat allows a remote attacker to read arbitrary files or include and execute arbitrary code on the server.
finding.processed.remediation: Upgrade to Apache Tomcat 9.0.31 or later.

alert.critical.title: Apache Tomcat AJP File Read / Inclusion
